title: meshmcp audit record
description: One line of a meshmcp tamper-evident audit log (JSONL). See AUDIT-RECORD.md v0.1.

time.description: RFC 3339 timestamp (may be empty in test vectors)

peer_spiffe_id.description: derived, additive SPIFFE identity label (spiffe://<trust-domain>/peer/<key>); never an enforcement input

cost.description: cost/quota units consumed (F29); omitted when zero

provenance.description: content refs that produced the answer (F6 provenance receipt)

schema_version.description: audit-record on-disk format version; a record newer than the reader's supported version is refused (fail closed)

delegated_caller.description: router delegation (Phase 4): the VERIFIED DelegationToken's original-caller claim; empty/absent when no decodable token was presented

delegation_router.description: router delegation: the transport-proven connecting router (recorded explicitly alongside peer_key per ROUTER-DELEGATION.md)

delegation_nonce.description: router delegation: the token's single-use replay nonce

payment.description: additive, optional payment receipt for a payment-gated call (x402 paid call or its free dry-run); REFERENCES only — never a wallet address or raw payment token. See PAYMENT-EVIDENCE.md.

amount.description: amount charged in the asset's minor units (string for exact precision)

payment_ref.description: one-way hash of the settlement reference; proves a settlement without exposing the on-chain transaction

payer_ref.description: one-way, per-deployment-salted hash of the payer; correlates repeat payers without exposing a wallet

dry_run.description: true when produced by the free dry-run route (no charge, backend not invoked)
